    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="fr">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>BTPForms — Formulaires PDF digitaux pour le BTP</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/jpeg" href="data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/4AAQSkZJRgABAQAAAQABAAD/2wBDAAgGBgcGBQgHBwcJCQgKDBQNDAsLDBkSEw8UHRofHh0aHBwgJC4nICIsIxwcKDcpLDAxNDQ0Hyc5PTgyPC4zNDL/2wBDAQkJCQwLDBgNDRgyIRwhMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjIyMjL/wgARCAAgACADASIAAhEBAxEB/8QAGAABAAMBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAABAABAwX/xAAVAQEBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAf/aAAwDAQACEAMQAAAC79WJGwqiEXkHbnof/9oADAMBAAIAAwAAACGlXvf/2gAMAwEAAgADAAAAEO97Nv/EABkRAQADAQEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAEAAhIxEf/aAAgBAgEBPwAF5ETsrbMvfT7P/8QAGREBAAMBAQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAQACETES/9oACAEDAQE/AFDsEeSxsrXyZP/EACcQAAIABAUCBwAAAAAAAAAAAAECAAMREgQQITFBE1EiMkJSYXFy/9oACAEBAAE/AoZlRbmYKO5gGoqNs2veb1Cb1U6JqKGp7QCZQWhtBPk35pz95yPXW6hZtq+5oe61GbTxqAD+hm2Fw7tc0iUSeSghcNIlmqSZan4XL//EAB0QAQACAgMBAQAAAAAAAAAAAAERIQAQMUFRYYH/2gAIAQEAAT8hx0I8rAYBIKsTvYvE5EAKaM8d5MYDAYQhWJ2j56HuPL8yiW4N393zaDlsguESjhMdf//EABwQAQACAgMBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAERIQAQMUFRcf/aAAgBAQABPxDOG9e3ItaLwL6iUgeEezYSg8wVfVMEgSeyGcoVOMwEogQCdlbSGECUiSFuU4JacuFzEtGA+fNv4aXg9VJc4oXJviGv//4AAwD/2Q==">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
    *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    :root{
    --P:#3282DE;--PD:#2268C0;--PL:#5BA3E8;
    --dark:#06060E;--dark2:#0D0C1D;
    --text:#111827;--muted:#6B7280;
    --border:#E4E4E7;--bg:#FFFFFF;--bgl:#F7F7FA;
    --r:8px;--rl:14px;--rxl:20px;
    }
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
    body{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--text);background:var(--bg);overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
    h1,h2,h3,h4,h5{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-0.025em}
    a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit}
    button{cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;border:none;outline:none}
    .w{max-width:1120px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 36px}
    .wn{max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 36px}
    /* ── REVEAL ── */
    .rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);transition:opacity .55s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),transform .55s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}
    .rv.in{opacity:1;transform:none}
    .d1{transition-delay:.07s}.d2{transition-delay:.14s}.d3{transition-delay:.21s}.d4{transition-delay:.28s}.d5{transition-delay:.38s}
    /* ══════════════ NAVBAR ══════════════ */
    nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:9000;transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s,background .3s;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.96);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);box-shadow:0 1px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
    nav.sc{border-color:var(--border);box-shadow:0 1px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.09);background:rgba(255,255,255,.99)}
    /* Always light — hero is white */
    nav .nl{color:#374151;font-size:14px;font-weight:400;transition:color .15s,background .15s}
    nav .nl:hover{background:var(--bgl);color:var(--text)}
    nav .bg{color:var(--text);font-size:14px;font-weight:400;padding:7px 16px;border-radius:var(--r);transition:background .15s,color .15s}
    nav .bg:hover{background:var(--bgl)}
    nav .bp{background:var(--P);color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;padding:8px 20px;border-radius:var(--r);transition:background .15s,box-shadow .15s;border:none}
    nav .bp:hover{background:var(--PD);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(50,130,222,.3)}
    .navi{display:flex;align-items:center;height:64px;gap:0}
    .nlogo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;margin-right:32px;flex-shrink:0}
    .nlinks{display:flex;align-items:center;flex:1}
    /* DROPDOWN FIX — ::after bridge le gap pour éviter la fermeture */
    .ni{position:relative}
    .ni::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:100%;left:-12px;right:-12px;height:16px;background:transparent}
    .nl{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:var(--r);white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;user-select:none}
    .nl-arr{width:10px;height:10px;transition:transform .2s;flex-shrink:0;opacity:.7}
    .ni:hover > .nl .nl-arr,.ni.op > .nl .nl-arr{transform:rotate(180deg)}
    .dd{
    position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);left:0;
    background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--rl);padding:6px;
    min-width:220px;
    box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.1),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
    opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;
    transform:translateY(-8px) scale(.975);transform-origin:top left;
    transition:opacity .18s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),transform .18s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),visibility .18s;
    }
    .ni:hover > .dd,.ni.op > .dd{opacity:1;visibility:visible;pointer-events:auto;transform:none}
    .ddw{min-width:560px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
    .dct{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;padding:8px 10px 4px}
    .dli{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:10px;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:500;color:#1f2937;transition:background .1s}
    .dli:hover{background:var(--bgl)}
    .dico{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:14px;margin-top:1px}
    .dsub{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:400;margin-top:2px;display:block;line-height:1.35}
    .ncta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0}
    /* ══════════════ HERO ══════════════ */
    .hero{padding:140px 0 0;background:#fff;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    /* Grille de points en relief subtile */
    .hg{
    position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;
    background-image:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(50,130,222,.13) 1px,transparent 1px);
    background-size:32px 32px;
    mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%,#000 40%,transparent 100%);
    -webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%,#000 40%,transparent 100%);
    }
    /* Orbes flottants bleus pastel */
    .hblob1{position:absolute;top:-60px;left:-80px;width:560px;height:560px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(50,130,222,.1) 0%,transparent 70%);z-index:1;pointer-events:none;animation:bA 9s ease-in-out infinite}
    .hblob2{position:absolute;top:40px;right:-60px;width:480px;height:480px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(91,163,232,.07) 0%,transparent 68%);z-index:1;pointer-events:none;animation:bB 12s ease-in-out infinite}
    .hblob3{position:absolute;bottom:-100px;left:40%;width:400px;height:400px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(50,130,222,.06) 0%,transparent 65%);z-index:1;pointer-events:none;animation:bC 10s ease-in-out infinite}
    /* Lignes décoratives SVG animées */
    .hlines{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden}
    .hlines svg{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%}
    @keyframes bA{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)}33%{transform:translate(40px,-20px) scale(1.05)}66%{transform:translate(-20px,30px) scale(.97)}}
    @keyframes bB{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)}40%{transform:translate(-30px,20px) scale(1.04)}75%{transform:translate(20px,-10px) scale(.98)}}
    @keyframes bC{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}50%{transform:translate(-40px,-20px)}}
    @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-200}}
    .hi{position:relative;z-index:2;text-align:center;padding-bottom:56px}
    .hbadge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(50,130,222,.07);border:1px solid rgba(50,130,222,.18);border-radius:20px;padding:5px 14px 5px 8px;font-size:12.5px;color:#2268C0;margin-bottom:32px}
    .hbpill{background:var(--P);color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:10px;letter-spacing:.02em}
    h1.ht{font-size:clamp(40px,6.2vw,76px);font-weight:800;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:24px;line-height:1.02}
    h1.ht em{font-style:normal;background:linear-gradient(110deg,var(--P) 0%,#5BA3E8 60%,#86c5f5 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
    .hsub{font-size:18px;color:var(--muted);max-width:520px;margin:0 auto 40px;line-height:1.75;font-weight:300}
    .hacts{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px}
    .bh1{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--P);color:#fff;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;padding:13px 26px;border-radius:10px;transition:background .15s,box-shadow .15s,transform .1s}
    .bh1:hover{background:var(--PD);box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(50,130,222,.38)}
    .bh1:active{transform:scale(.97)}
    .bh2{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#fff;color:var(--text);font-size:15px;font-weight:400;padding:13px 26px;border-radius:10px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);transition:background .15s,border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s}
    .bh2:hover{border-color:var(--P);color:var(--P);box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(50,130,222,.1)}
    .hnote{font-size:12.5px;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:56px}
    /* Stats */
    .hstats{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:48px;margin-bottom:44px}
    .hst{text-align:center}
    .hstn{font-size:30px;font-weight:800;color:var(--text);line-height:1}
    .hstl{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;font-weight:300}
    .hsdiv{width:1px;height:40px;background:var(--border)}
    /* ── APP MOCKUP HERO ── */
    .hmkp{max-width:1060px;margin:0 auto;position:relative}
    .appwin{
    border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:none;
    box-shadow:0 -8px 40px rgba(50,130,222,.1),0 -2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
    background:#fff;
    }
    .appbar{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:11px 16px;gap:7px;background:#f7f7f9;border-bottom:1px solid #e4e4e7}
    .abt{width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%}
    .abt.r{background:#ff5f57}.abt.y{background:#ffbd2e}.abt.g{background:#28c840}
    .appurl{flex:1;max-width:300px;margin:0 auto;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e4e4e7;border-radius:6px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:11.5px;color:#9ca3af;text-align:center;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .appbody{display:grid;grid-template-columns:220px 1fr 260px;min-height:480px;background:#fff}
    /* Sidebar */
    .aps{border-right:1px solid #e4e4e7;padding:16px 0;background:#fff}
    .aps-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:0 16px;margin-bottom:16px}
    .aps-user{padding:0 16px 12px;font-size:12px;color:#9ca3af;font-weight:400}
    .aps-section{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#d1d5db;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;padding:8px 16px 4px}
    .aps-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;color:#374151;cursor:pointer;transition:background .1s;border-radius:0}
    .aps-item:hover{background:#f7f7f9}
    .aps-item.act{color:var(--P);background:#f0edff;font-weight:500}
    .aps-item svg{width:14px;height:14px;flex-shrink:0;opacity:.7}
    .aps-sep{height:1px;background:#e4e4e7;margin:8px 16px}
    .aps-ws{padding:0 16px 4px}
    .aps-ws-title{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:500;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:6px}
    .aps-ws-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12.5px;color:#374151;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .1s;margin-bottom:2px}
    .aps-ws-item:hover{background:#f7f7f9}
    .aps-ws-item.open{color:var(--P)}
    .aps-ws-sub{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 8px 4px 22px;font-size:12px;color:#6B7280;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .1s;margin-bottom:2px}
    .aps-ws-sub:hover{background:#f7f7f9}
    .ws-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
    /* Builder center */
    .apc{padding:20px;background:#f7f7f9;overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center}
    .pdf-mock{background:#fff;border-radius:6px;width:100%;max-width:320px;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.1);overflow:hidden}
    .pdf-mock-top{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:8px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e4e4e7;gap:8px}
    .pdf-back{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11.5px;color:#374151;font-weight:500;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .pdf-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#111827;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .pdf-tag{background:#dcfce7;color:#16a34a;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:5px}
    .pdf-body{padding:14px}
    .pdf-h1{font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:#2F3970;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;text-align:center;margin-bottom:4px}
    .pdf-h2{font-size:9px;color:#2F3970;text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-style:italic;border-bottom:1px solid #e4e4e7;padding-bottom:10px}
    .pdf-lbl{font-size:8.5px;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .pdf-inp{height:22px;border:1.5px solid;border-radius:4px;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 8px;font-size:8.5px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;position:relative}
    .pi-alo{border-color:#2F3970;background:rgba(47,57,112,.08);color:#2F3970;font-weight:500}
    .pi-vio{border-color:rgba(139,92,246,.4);background:#f5f3ff;color:#7c3aed}
    .pi-acc{border-color:rgba(50,130,222,.35);background:#f0edff;color:var(--P)}
    .pdf-chkrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px}
    .pdf-chk{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:3px;border:1.5px solid #10b981;background:#ecfdf5;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
    .pdf-chktxt{font-size:8.5px;color:#374151;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .pdf-sign{border:1.5px dashed rgba(50,130,222,.28);border-radius:5px;height:28px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:5px;font-size:8.5px;color:#9ca3af;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .dhandle{position:absolute;right:-8px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:17px;height:17px;background:var(--P);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;color:#fff;font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(50,130,222,.5);animation:df 2.8s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes df{0%,100%{transform:translateY(-50%) translate(0,0)}50%{transform:translateY(-50%) translate(-2px,-3px)}}
    /* Fields panel */
    .apf{border-left:1px solid #e4e4e7;padding:14px;background:#fff;overflow:auto}
    .apft{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#111827;margin-bottom:4px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .apfs{font-size:10.5px;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:12px;line-height:1.4;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .fld{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:9px 10px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:500;color:#1f2937;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;border:1px solid;cursor:grab;transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s}
    .fld:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
    .fld-ico{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0}
    .f-txt{background:#eff6ff;border-color:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8}.f-txt .fld-ico{background:#dbeafe}
    .f-zone{background:#f0f9ff;border-color:#bae6fd;color:#0369a1}.f-zone .fld-ico{background:#bae6fd}
    .f-date{background:#f5f3ff;border-color:#ddd6fe;color:#6d28d9}.f-date .fld-ico{background:#ddd6fe}
    .f-chk{background:#f0fdf4;border-color:#bbf7d0;color:#166534}.f-chk .fld-ico{background:#bbf7d0}
    .f-list{background:#ecfeff;border-color:#a5f3fc;color:#0e7490}.f-list .fld-ico{background:#a5f3fc}
    .f-img{background:#fdf2f8;border-color:#f9a8d4;color:#9d174d}.f-img .fld-ico{background:#f9a8d4}
    .f-sign{background:#fff1f2;border-color:#fecdd3;color:#9f1239}.f-sign .fld-ico{background:#fecdd3}
    .f-alo-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin:10px 0 6px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .f-alo{background:rgba(47,57,112,.06);border-color:rgba(47,57,112,.2);color:#2F3970}.f-alo .fld-ico{background:rgba(47,57,112,.15)}
    /* ── BAND ── */
    .band{border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:16px 0;background:var(--bgl)}
    .bin{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:32px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:0 24px}
    .bi{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13.5px;color:var(--muted)}
    .bi strong{color:var(--text);font-weight:500}
    .bi-ico{font-size:15px;line-height:1}
    /* ── SECTIONS ── */
    section{padding:80px 0}
    .slbl{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--P);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.09em;margin-bottom:64px}
    .slbl::before{content:'';width:14px;height:2px;background:var(--P);border-radius:1px;flex-shrink:0}
    h2.st{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(26px,3.5vw,44px);font-weight:800;line-height:1.06;margin-bottom:14px}
    p.ss{font-size:17px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.72;max-width:500px;font-weight:300}
    /* ── FEATURE BLOCKS ── */
    .fb{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:72px;align-items:center;padding:72px 0}
    .fb+.fb{border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .fb.fl .fbv{order:-1}
    .fbt .badge{margin-bottom:20px}
    .fbt h2{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(22px,2.6vw,34px);font-weight:800;margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.1}
    .fbt p{font-size:15.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.74;margin-bottom:26px;font-weight:300}
    .fbl{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
    .fbl li{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:14px;color:#374151}
    .fbl li::before{
    content:'';width:18px;height:18px;flex-shrink:0;border-radius:50%;
    background:#f0edff url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 18 18' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M4 9l3.5 3.5L14 6' stroke='%234F35F3' stroke-width='2' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") center/14px no-repeat;
    border:1.5px solid rgba(50,130,222,.2);
    }
    .badge-s{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#f0edff;color:var(--P);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid rgba(50,130,222,.18);margin-bottom:20px}
    .bdot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--P);animation:bd 2s infinite}
    @keyframes bd{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(.7)}}
    .fbv{border-radius:var(--rxl);overflow:hidden;background:var(--bgl);border:1px solid var(--border)}
    .fbvi{padding:20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;min-height:280px}
    /* Visual card */
    .vc{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:14px;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s}
    .vc:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
    .vch{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:11px}
    .vct{font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)}
    .tg{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid}
    .tgg{background:#f0fdf4;color:#166534;border-color:#bbf7d0}
    .tgp{background:#f0edff;color:var(--P);border-color:rgba(50,130,222,.2)}
    .tgam{background:#fffbeb;color:#92400e;border-color:#fde68a}
    .vcr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .vcr:last-child{border-bottom:none}
    .vci{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bgl);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12.5px;flex-shrink:0}
    .vcl{font-size:12px;color:var(--text);font-weight:400}
    .vcs{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
    .vcv{font-size:11.5px;font-weight:600}
    /* Stats */
    .sg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
    .si{background:var(--bgl);border-radius:var(--r);padding:14px;text-align:center}
    .sin{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:var(--P);line-height:1}
    .sil{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px}
    /* Progress */
    .pw{height:5px;background:var(--bgl);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:5px}
    .pb{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--P),var(--PL));border-radius:3px;transition:width 1.3s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}
    /* SaaS integration card */
    .aloc{background:linear-gradient(140deg,#2F3970 0%,#1b2260 100%);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:16px}
    .aloh{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px}
    .alolog{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,.9)}
    .alobdg{background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-weight:600}
    .alor{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);font-size:12px}
    .alor:last-child{border-bottom:none}
    .alok{color:rgba(255,255,255,.45)}
    .alov{color:rgba(255,255,255,.88);font-weight:500}
    /* ── FEATURES GRID ── */
    .bg-alt{background:var(--bgl);border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .fgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rxl);overflow:hidden;margin-top:56px}
    .fc{background:#fff;padding:28px;transition:background .16s}
    .fc:hover{background:var(--bgl)}
    .fci{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:11px;background:var(--bgl);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:21px;margin-bottom:18px;transition:transform .22s}
    .fc:hover .fci{transform:scale(1.1) rotate(-6deg)}
    .fc h3{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15.5px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:7px}
    .fc p{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.64;font-weight:300}
    /* ── HOW ── */
    .hbg{background:var(--bgl);border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .howg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rxl);overflow:hidden;margin-top:56px}
    .hstep{background:#fff;padding:36px 28px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .hstep:not(:first-child){border-left:1px solid var(--border)}
    .hn{position:absolute;top:16px;right:20px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:52px;font-weight:800;color:#f3f4f6;line-height:1;user-select:none}
    .hic{width:48px;height:48px;background:var(--P);border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;margin-bottom:20px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(50,130,222,.3)}
    .hstep h3{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:9px}
    .hstep p{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.68;font-weight:300}
    /* ── INTEGRATIONS ── */
    .ibg{background:var(--dark2)}
    .ibg .slbl{color:var(--PL)}
    .ibg h2{color:#fff}
    .ibg p.ss{color:rgba(255,255,255,.42)}
    .igrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px;margin-top:52px}
    .icard{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:26px 18px;text-align:center;transition:background .2s,border-color .2s,transform .22s}
    .icard:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-color:rgba(50,130,222,.3);transform:translateY(-3px)}
    .iico{width:50px;height:50px;border-radius:13px;margin:0 auto 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px}
    .inm{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:4px}
    .ids{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.36)}
    /* ── PRICING ── */
    /* Toggle */
    .ptog-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0;background:var(--bgl);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:3px;width:fit-content;margin:0 auto 44px}
    .ptog-btn{font-size:13.5px;font-weight:500;padding:7px 20px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s,color .2s,box-shadow .2s;color:var(--muted);background:transparent;border:none;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .ptog-btn.act{background:#fff;color:var(--text);box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}
    .ptog-badge{background:#dcfce7;color:#166534;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:6px;margin-left:6px}
    .pgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:18px}
    .pcard{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rxl);padding:28px;position:relative;transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s}
    .pcard:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
    .pcard.pop{border-color:var(--P);border-width:1.5px}
    .pcard.pop::before{content:'Le plus commandé';position:absolute;top:-1.5px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--P);color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:4px 14px;border-radius:0 0 9px 9px;white-space:nowrap;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .pplan{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .pamount{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:42px;font-weight:800;color:var(--text);line-height:1}
    .pper{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--muted);margin-left:3px}
    .pusers{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin:6px 0 10px}
    .pdesc{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:20px;font-weight:300;line-height:1.5}
    .psep{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin-bottom:20px}
    .pfl{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-bottom:24px}
    .pfl li{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:13px;color:#374151;line-height:1.4}
    .pfl li::before{content:'';width:16px;height:16px;min-width:16px;border-radius:50%;margin-top:1px;background:#f0edff url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 16 16' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M3 8l3 3 7-6' stroke='%234F35F3' stroke-width='1.8' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") center/12px no-repeat;border:1.5px solid rgba(50,130,222,.2)}
    .pfl li.off{color:var(--muted)}
    .pfl li.off::before{background:#f9f9f9 url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 16 16' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M4.5 8h7' stroke='%23d1d5db' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") center/12px no-repeat;border-color:#e5e7eb}
    .pbtn{display:block;text-align:center;padding:10px;border-radius:9px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s,color .15s,transform .1s;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;letter-spacing:-.01em}
    .pbtn:active{transform:scale(.97)}
    .pb-o{border:1.5px solid var(--border);color:var(--text)}
    .pb-o:hover{border-color:var(--P);color:var(--P);background:var(--bgl)}
    .pb-f{background:var(--P);color:#fff;border:1.5px solid var(--P)}
    .pb-f:hover{background:var(--PD);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(50,130,222,.28)}
    .pb-d{background:#f3f4f6;color:var(--muted);border:1.5px solid var(--border);cursor:default}
    /* Promo */
    /* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */
    .tbg2{background:var(--bgl);border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .tgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:18px;margin-top:52px}
    .tcard{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rxl);padding:24px;transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s}
    .tcard:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 10px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
    .tstars{color:#f59e0b;font-size:13.5px;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:12px}
    .ttxt{font-size:13.5px;color:#374151;line-height:1.74;margin-bottom:18px;font-weight:300;font-style:italic}
    .tauth{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
    .tav{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bgl);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--P);border:1.5px solid rgba(50,130,222,.18);flex-shrink:0;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .tnm{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .trl{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted)}
    /* ── FAQ ── */
    .flist{border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rxl);overflow:hidden;margin-top:44px}
    .fi{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff}
    .fi:last-child{border-bottom:none}
    .fq{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:18px 24px;cursor:pointer;gap:14px;transition:background .15s;user-select:none}
    .fq:hover{background:var(--bgl)}
    .fq h3{font-size:15px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);line-height:1.4;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .farr{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bgl);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:transform .25s,background .15s,border-color .15s}
    .farr svg{width:11px;height:11px;stroke:var(--muted);transition:stroke .15s}
    .fi.op .farr{transform:rotate(180deg);background:var(--P);border-color:var(--P)}
    .fi.op .farr svg{stroke:#fff}
    .fans{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .36s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}
    .fans p{padding:0 24px 20px;font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.72;font-weight:300}
    .fi.op .fans{max-height:280px}
    /* ── CTA ── */
    .ctad{background:var(--dark);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .ctabl{position:absolute;bottom:-80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:680px;height:420px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(50,130,222,.2) 0%,transparent 68%);pointer-events:none}
    .ctain{position:relative;z-index:1;text-align:center;padding:100px 36px}
    .ctain h2{font-size:clamp(32px,5vw,58px);font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-bottom:16px}
    .ctain p{font-size:18px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:36px;max-width:440px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;font-weight:300;line-height:1.68}
    .ctaacts{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:13px}
    /* Ghost btn overrides for dark CTA context */
    .ctad .bh2{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.18)}
    .ctad .bh2:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);color:#fff;box-shadow:none}
    .ctanote{font-size:12.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.24)}
    .prow{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);padding:28px 36px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:44px;flex-wrap:wrap;position:relative;z-index:1}
    .plbl{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.25);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em}
    .pnm{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,.14);letter-spacing:-0.02em;transition:color .2s}
    .pnm:hover{color:rgba(255,255,255,.45)}
    /* ── FOOTER ── */
    footer{background:var(--bgl);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:60px 0 32px}
    .ftg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:200px repeat(4,1fr);gap:40px;margin-bottom:48px}
    .ftlogo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;font-size:17px;margin-bottom:12px}
    .fttag{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65;font-weight:300}
    .ftcol h4{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;margin-bottom:14px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .ftlinks{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
    .ftlinks a{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);transition:color .15s}
    .ftlinks a:hover{color:var(--P)}
    .ftbot{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px}
    .ftcopy{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)}
    .ftleg{display:flex;gap:20px}
    .ftleg a{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);transition:color .15s}
    .ftleg a:hover{color:var(--text)}
    /* ══════════════ TEMPLATES SECTION ══════════════ */
    .tpl-section{background:#fff;border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .tpl-carousel-outer{position:relative;margin-top:52px}
    /* Fade masks */
    .tpl-carousel-outer::before,.tpl-carousel-outer::after{
    content:'';position:absolute;top:0;bottom:16px;width:72px;z-index:3;pointer-events:none;
    }
    .tpl-carousel-outer::before{left:0;background:linear-gradient(to right,#fff 30%,transparent)}
    .tpl-carousel-outer::after{right:0;background:linear-gradient(to left,#fff 30%,transparent)}
    /* Track */
    .tpl-track{
    display:flex;gap:16px;
    padding:4px 64px 20px;
    overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
    scrollbar-width:none;scroll-behavior:smooth;
    cursor:grab;
    }
    .tpl-track::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
    .tpl-track.dragging{cursor:grabbing;scroll-behavior:auto;user-select:none}
    /* Card */
    .tpl-card{
    background:#fff;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;
    min-width:240px;max-width:240px;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden;
    transition:transform .22s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),box-shadow .22s,border-color .22s;
    }
    .tpl-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 14px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.09);border-color:rgba(50,130,222,.25)}
    /* Card preview area */
    .tpl-preview{
    background:#f0f2f5;height:150px;display:flex;align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
    }
    .tpl-preview-form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;width:110px;opacity:.35}
    .tpl-preview-row{height:8px;background:#2F3970;border-radius:3px}
    .tpl-preview-row.w-full{width:100%}
    .tpl-preview-row.w-half{width:55%}
    .tpl-preview-2col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:7px}
    .tpl-preview-box{height:24px;background:#2F3970;border-radius:4px}
    /* Card body */
    .tpl-card-body{padding:18px 18px 20px}
    .tpl-cat{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;
    font-size:10px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.09em;text-transform:uppercase;
    padding:3px 9px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid;margin-bottom:12px;
    }
    .tpl-cat-chantier{background:#eff6ff;color:#1d4ed8;border-color:#bfdbfe}
    .tpl-cat-livraison{background:#fdf4ff;color:#7e22ce;border-color:#e9d5ff}
    .tpl-cat-conformite{background:#fff7ed;color:#c2410c;border-color:#fed7aa}
    .tpl-cat-securite{background:#fff1f2;color:#be123c;border-color:#fecdd3}
    .tpl-cat-presence{background:#f0fdf4;color:#15803d;border-color:#bbf7d0}
    .tpl-card h3{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:5px;line-height:1.3}
    .tpl-card p{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.55;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:16px}
    .tpl-btn{
    display:block;width:100%;text-align:center;
    background:#06060E;color:#fff;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:600;
    padding:10px 0;border-radius:9px;border:none;cursor:pointer;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;text-decoration:none;
    transition:background .15s,transform .1s;
    }
    .tpl-btn:hover{background:#1a1a2e}
    .tpl-btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}
    /* CTA row */
    .tpl-cta-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin-top:44px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .tpl-pill{background:rgba(50,130,222,.1);color:var(--P);font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:4px}
    /* Responsive */
    @media(max-width:900px){
    .tpl-track{padding:4px 36px 20px;gap:14px}
    .tpl-carousel-outer::before,.tpl-carousel-outer::after{width:44px}
    }
    @media(max-width:640px){
    .tpl-card{min-width:210px;max-width:210px}
    .tpl-track{padding:4px 20px 20px;gap:12px}
    .tpl-carousel-outer::before,.tpl-carousel-outer::after{width:28px}
    .tpl-preview{height:120px}
    .tpl-cta-row{flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch}
    .tpl-cta-row .bh1,.tpl-cta-row .bh2{justify-content:center;text-align:center}
    }
    @media(max-width:480px){
    .tpl-card{min-width:190px;max-width:190px}
    .tpl-card-body{padding:14px 14px 16px}
    }
    /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
    @media(max-width:1024px){
    .appbody{grid-template-columns:180px 1fr 220px}
    .aps{display:none}
    .appbody{grid-template-columns:1fr 220px}
    }
    @media(max-width:900px){
    .w{padding:0 24px}
    .wn{padding:0 24px}
    .fb{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}
    .fb.fl .fbv{order:0}
    .fgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
    .howg{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .hstep:not(:first-child){border-left:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .igrid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
    .pgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .tgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .ftg{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
    .appbody{grid-template-columns:1fr 200px;min-height:360px}
    .aps{display:none}
    .bin{gap:20px 32px}
    }
    @media(max-width:640px){
    .w{padding:0 16px}
    .wn{padding:0 16px}
    section{padding:72px 0}
    .hstats{gap:20px 32px;margin-bottom:28px}
    .ptog-btn{font-size:12.5px;padding:7px 14px}
    .ptog-badge{display:block;margin:2px auto 0;text-align:center}
    h1.ht{font-size:clamp(32px,8vw,56px)}
    .hero{padding:96px 0 0}
    .hi{padding-bottom:36px}
    .hmkp{display:none}
    .fgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .igrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .ftg{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .bin{gap:16px 24px}
    .bi{font-size:12.5px}
    .hsdiv{display:none}
    .ptog-wrap{width:100%;justify-content:center}
    .ptog-btn{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;padding:8px 12px}
    .pgrid{gap:14px}
    .ctain{padding:72px 20px}
    .ctaacts{flex-direction:column;align-items:center}
    }
    /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    HAMBURGER & MOBILE MENU
    ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .hamburger{
    display:none;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;
    width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:8px;background:transparent;border:none;
    cursor:pointer;padding:6px;gap:5px;margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0;
    transition:background .15s;
    }
    .hamburger:hover{background:var(--bgl)}
    .hamburger span{
    display:block;width:22px;height:2px;background:#374151;border-radius:2px;
    transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),opacity .2s,width .25s;
    transform-origin:center;
    }
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(7px) rotate(45deg)}
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(2){opacity:0;width:0}
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg)}
    /* Mobile overlay menu */
    #mobile-menu{
    display:none;position:fixed;top:65px;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:8900;
    background:#fff;overflow-y:auto;padding:0 0 32px;
    transform:translateY(-12px);opacity:0;
    transition:transform .28s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),opacity .22s;
    }
    #mobile-menu.visible{display:block}
    #mobile-menu.open{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}
    /* Prevent body scroll when menu open */
    body.menu-open{overflow:hidden}
    .mm-section{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0}
    .mm-section-title{
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    padding:15px 20px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);
    cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;width:100%;text-align:left;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;
    }
    .mm-section-title .mm-arr{
    width:18px;height:18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    transition:transform .22s;flex-shrink:0;opacity:.6;
    }
    .mm-section.open .mm-arr{transform:rotate(180deg)}
    .mm-links{display:none;padding:4px 12px 12px}
    .mm-section.open .mm-links{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}
    .mm-link{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 10px;
    border-radius:10px;text-decoration:none;
    transition:background .12s;
    }
    .mm-link:hover{background:var(--bgl)}
    .mm-link-ico{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bgl);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:15px;flex-shrink:0}
    .mm-link strong{font-size:14px;color:#1f2937;display:block}
    .mm-link span{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);display:block;margin-top:1px}
    .mm-direct{
    display:block;padding:15px 20px;font-size:15px;font-weight:500;
    color:var(--text);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .mm-cta{padding:20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
    .mm-cta .bh1,.mm-cta .bp,.mm-cta .btn-cta{
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    gap:8px;padding:13px 20px;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;
    text-decoration:none;
    }
    .mm-btn-primary{background:var(--P);color:#fff;border-radius:10px;border:none;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    .mm-btn-secondary{background:var(--bgl);color:var(--text);border-radius:10px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    GLOBAL RESPONSIVE — all pages
    ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    img,video,iframe,svg.hero-img{max-width:100%;height:auto}
    /* ── TABLET ≤ 1024px ── */
    @media(max-width:1024px){
    .w{padding:0 28px}
    .wn{padding:0 28px}
    /* navbar */
    .nlinks,.ncta{display:none}
    .hamburger{display:flex}
    /* cards & grids */
    .card-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
    .two-col{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}
    .feat-cols{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    /* feature pages */
    .pg-title{font-size:clamp(28px,4.5vw,48px)}
    }
    /* ── TABLET ≤ 900px ── */
    @media(max-width:900px){
    .w{padding:0 24px}
    .wn{padding:0 24px}
    section{padding:72px 0}
    /* grids */
    .fb{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}
    .fb.fl .fbv{order:0}
    .fgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
    .howg{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .hstep:not(:first-child){border-left:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .igrid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
    .pgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .tgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .ftg{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
    /* app mockup */
    .appbody{grid-template-columns:1fr 200px;min-height:360px}
    .aps{display:none}
    .bin{gap:20px 32px}
    /* aux pages */
    .card-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
    .aide-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)!important}
    .chg-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}
    .contact-cols{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}
    .legal-toc{display:none!important}
    .legal-body{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}
    }
    /* ── MOBILE ≤ 640px ── */
    @media(max-width:640px){
    .w{padding:0 16px}
    .wn{padding:0 16px}
    section{padding:56px 0}
    /* typography */
    h1.ht{font-size:clamp(30px,8vw,48px)}
    h2.sh{font-size:clamp(22px,6vw,36px)!important}
    h2.sec-h{font-size:clamp(20px,5.5vw,32px)}
    .pg-title{font-size:clamp(26px,7vw,42px)}
    /* hero */
    .hero{padding:96px 0 0}
    .hi{padding-bottom:36px}
    .hmkp{display:none}
    .hstats{flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 28px;justify-content:center}
    .hsdiv{display:none}
    .hacts{flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;width:100%;max-width:340px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}
    .bh1,.bh2{justify-content:center}
    .hsub{font-size:16px}
    /* grids */
    .fgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .igrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .ftg{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .card-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .aide-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}
    .chg-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}
    /* bands */
    .bin{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:14px}
    .bi{font-size:13px}
    /* pricing */
    .ptog-wrap{width:100%;justify-content:center}
    .ptog-btn{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;padding:8px 12px}
    .pgrid{gap:14px}
    /* cta */
    .ctain{padding:56px 16px}
    .ctaacts{flex-direction:column;align-items:center}
    /* footer */
    .ftg{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:28px}
    .ftbot{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px}
    .ftleg{flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px}
    /* feature pages */
    .two-col{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:32px}
    .mockup-box{display:none}
    /* pages content */
    .pg-hero{padding:96px 0 48px}
    .pg-sub{font-size:15px}
    /* contact */
    .contact-cols{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;gap:32px!important}
    /* changelot */
    .chg-item{padding:20px!important}
    /* helpers */
    .hide-mobile{display:none!important}
    /* modals */
    #modal-rappel > div{padding:28px 20px}
    #modal-rappel [style*="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr"]{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}
    }
    /* ── MOBILE ≤ 480px ── */
    @media(max-width:480px){
    .w{padding:0 14px}
    .wn{padding:0 14px}
    h1.ht{font-size:clamp(28px,8.5vw,42px)}
    .hbadge{font-size:11px}
    .hero{padding:84px 0 0}
    .hi{padding-bottom:28px}
    .nlogo svg{width:100px;height:26px}
    .bh1,.bh2{font-size:14px;padding:12px 20px}
    .hstats{gap:12px 20px}
    .hstn{font-size:26px}
    .fgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .card-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    section{padding:48px 0}
    /* legal */
    .legal-content{font-size:14px!important}
    }
    /* ── GRAND ÉCRAN ≥ 1441px ── */
    @media(min-width:1441px){
    .w{max-width:1280px}
    h1.ht{font-size:82px}
    .hmkp{max-width:1200px}
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- ══ NAVBAR ══ -->
    <nav id="nav">
    <div class="w">
    <div class="navi">
    <a href="index.html" class="nlogo">

    <div class="nl">Fonctionnalités <svg class="nl-arr" viewBox="0 0 10 10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9"><path d="M1.5 3.5l3 3 3-3"/></svg></div>

    <div>
    <div class="dct">Créer & Publier</div>

    <a href="fonctionnalites-signatures.html" class="dli"><div class="dico f-sign" style="background:#fff1f2;border-radius:8px">✍️</div><div><strong>Signature pad</strong><span class="dsub">Intégrée dans le PDF final</span></div></a>
    </div>

    <div class="dct">Gérer & Exporter</div>
    <a href="fonctionnalites-soumissions.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:#f0fdf4;border-radius:8px">📥</div><div><strong>Soumissions</strong><span class="dsub">Filtres, édition, export PDF</span></div></a>
    <a href="fonctionnalites-app-connexions.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:rgba(47,57,112,.1);border-radius:8px">🔗</div><div><strong>App connexions</strong><span class="dsub">Connectez vos outils internes</span></div></a>
    <a href="fonctionnalites-membres.html" class="dli"><div class="dico f-vio" style="background:#f5f3ff;border-radius:8px">👥</div><div><strong>Membres</strong><span class="dsub">Rôles et invitations</span></div></a>
    <a href="fonctionnalites-workspaces.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:#f7f7f9;border-radius:8px">🏢</div><div><strong>Espaces de travail</strong><span class="dsub">Workspaces par projet</span></div></a>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ni">
    <div class="nl">Usages <svg class="nl-arr" viewBox="0 0 10 10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9"><path d="M1.5 3.5l3 3 3-3"/></svg></div>
    <div class="dd">
    <a href="usages-suivi-chantier.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:#f7f7f9;border-radius:8px">🏗️</div><div><strong>Suivi de chantier</strong><span class="dsub">Rapports & comptes rendus</span></div></a>
    <a href="usages-rapport-intervention.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:#f7f7f9;border-radius:8px">📋</div><div><strong>Rapport d'intervention</strong><span class="dsub">Fiches d'intervention terrain</span></div></a>
    <a href="usages-pv-reception.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:#f7f7f9;border-radius:8px">📋</div><div><strong>PV de réception</strong><span class="dsub">Procès verbaux dématérialisés</span></div></a>
    <a href="usages-securite.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:#f7f7f9;border-radius:8px">🔒</div><div><strong>Sécurité & conformité</strong><span class="dsub">Permis de feu, EPI, sécurité</span></div></a>
    <a href="usages-presence.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:#f7f7f9;border-radius:8px">👷</div><div><strong>Présence terrain</strong><span class="dsub">Feuilles de présence / heures</span></div></a>
    <a href="usages-logistique.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:#f7f7f9;border-radius:8px">🚚</div><div><strong>Logistique</strong><span class="dsub">Bons de livraison</span></div></a>
    </div>
    </div>
    <a href="#pricing" class="nl">Tarifs</a>
    <div class="ni">
    <div class="nl">Ressources <svg class="nl-arr" viewBox="0 0 10 10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9"><path d="M1.5 3.5l3 3 3-3"/></svg></div>
    <div class="dd">
    <a href="aide.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:#f7f7f9;border-radius:8px">📖</div><div><strong>Centre d'aide</strong><span class="dsub">Guides et tutoriels</span></div></a>
    <a href="contact.html" class="dli"><div class="dico" style="background:#f7f7f9;border-radius:8px">✉️</div><div><strong>Nous contacter</strong><span class="dsub">Réponse sous 24h</span></div></a>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ncta">
    <a href="https://btpforms.com" class="bg">Se connecter</a>

    </div>

    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
    </button>
    </div>
    </div>

    <a href="fonctionnalites-formulaires.html" class="mm-link"><div class="mm-link-ico" style="background:#f0fdf4">🌐</div><div><strong>Formulaires publiés</strong><span>Lien public ou privé sécurisé</span></div></a>

    </button>

    <!-- CTAs -->
    <div class="mm-cta">
    <a href="https://btpforms.com" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:13px 20px;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;background:var(--bgl);color:var(--text);border:1.5px solid var(--border);text-decoration:none">Se connecter</a>
    <a href="https://btpforms.com" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:13px 20px;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;background:var(--P);color:#fff;text-decoration:none">Essai gratuit — 7 jours</a>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ══ HERO ══ -->
    <section class="hero">
    <div class="hg"></div><div class="hblob1"></div><div class="hblob2"></div><div class="hblob3"></div>
    <!-- Animated SVG relief lines -->
    <div class="hlines" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 1200 700" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <path d="M-100 200 Q 300 50 600 200 T 1300 200" fill="none" stroke="rgba(50,130,222,.08)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="8 6" style="animation:dash 18s linear infinite"/>
    <path d="M-100 350 Q 250 180 600 350 T 1300 350" fill="none" stroke="rgba(50,130,222,.05)" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="12 8" style="animation:dash 24s linear infinite reverse"/>
    <path d="M-100 500 Q 400 320 700 480 T 1400 460" fill="none" stroke="rgba(91,163,232,.06)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="6 10" style="animation:dash 20s linear infinite"/>
    <circle cx="15%" cy="30%" r="140" fill="none" stroke="rgba(50,130,222,.04)" stroke-width="1" style="animation:dash 30s linear infinite"/>
    <circle cx="85%" cy="65%" r="100" fill="none" stroke="rgba(50,130,222,.04)" stroke-width="1" style="animation:dash 25s linear infinite reverse"/>
    </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="w">
    <div class="hi">
    <div class="hbadge rv"><span class="hbpill">Nouveau</span> Connecté à vos outils — pré-remplissage automatique depuis vos PDF</div>
    <h1 class="ht rv d1">Vos formulaires BTP,<br><em>dématérialisés en 15 min</em></h1>
    <p class="hsub rv d2">Uploadez votre PDF, posez vos champs, publiez. Vos équipes remplissent depuis leur téléphone — vous récupérez des PDF signés.</p>
    <div class="hacts rv d3">
    <a href="https://btpforms.com" class="bh1">🚀 Essayer gratuitement</a>
    <button onclick="openRappel()" class="bh2" style="cursor:pointer">📞 Être rappelé</button>
    </div>
    <p class="hnote rv d3">7 jours gratuits · Aucune carte requise · À partir de 19€ HT/mois</p>
    <div class="hstats rv d4">
    <div class="hst"><div class="hstn">+2 000</div><div class="hstl">Formulaires créés</div></div>
    <div class="hsdiv"></div>
    <div class="hst"><div class="hstn">98%</div><div class="hstl">Satisfaction client</div></div>
    <div class="hsdiv"></div>
    <div class="hst"><div class="hstn">15 min</div><div class="hstl">Pour démarrer</div></div>
    <div class="hsdiv"></div>
    <div class="hst"><div class="hstn">4,9/5</div><div class="hstl">Note moyenne</div></div>
    </div>
    <!-- App mockup fidèle aux screenshots -->
    <div class="hmkp rv d5">
    <div class="appwin">
    <!-- Top bar fidèle au screenshot réel -->
    <div class="appbar" style="justify-content:space-between;padding:9px 14px">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
    <div class="abt r"></div><div class="abt y"></div><div class="abt g"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:12px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">
    <span style="color:#374151;font-weight:500;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px">
    <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M10 8H6m-3 0h2m5 0h2M8 5v2m0 2v2"/><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6"/></svg>
    Retour
    </span>
    <span style="color:#111827;font-weight:600">test</span>
    <span style="background:#dcfce7;color:#166534;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:5px">Public</span>
    <span style="background:#fef9c3;color:#92400e;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:500;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:5px">Non enregistré</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
    <button style="font-size:11.5px;font-weight:500;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:7px;border:1px solid #e4e4e7;background:#fff;color:#374151;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit">Dépublier</button>
    <button style="font-size:11.5px;font-weight:600;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:7px;border:none;background:#111827;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px">
    <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 8h10M8 3v10"/></svg>
    Enregistrer
    </button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="appbody">
    <!-- Gauche : Ordre des champs sur la page -->
    <div class="aps" style="padding:16px 12px;background:#fff;border-right:1px solid #e4e4e7">
    <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#111827;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">Ordre des champs sur la page</div>
    <div style="font-size:11.5px;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:14px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">Glissez pour réordonner.</div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #e4e4e7;background:#fff;font-size:12.5px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#374151">
    <svg width="10" height="14" viewBox="0 0 10 14" fill="none" style="opacity:.4;flex-shrink:0"><circle cx="3" cy="2" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="7" cy="2" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="3" cy="7" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="7" cy="7" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="3" cy="12" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="7" cy="12" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
    <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:11px">T</span>
    <div><span style="font-weight:600">Texte libre</span> <span style="color:#9ca3af">(Texte ...)</span></div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #e4e4e7;background:#fff;font-size:12.5px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#374151">
    <svg width="10" height="14" viewBox="0 0 10 14" fill="none" style="opacity:.4;flex-shrink:0"><circle cx="3" cy="2" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="7" cy="2" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="3" cy="7" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="7" cy="7" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="3" cy="12" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="7" cy="12" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
    <span style="color:#8b5cf6;font-size:11px">📅</span>
    <div><span style="font-weight:600">Date</span> <span style="color:#9ca3af">(Date)</span></div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #e4e4e7;background:#fff;font-size:12.5px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#374151">
    <svg width="10" height="14" viewBox="0 0 10 14" fill="none" style="opacity:.4;flex-shrink:0"><circle cx="3" cy="2" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="7" cy="2" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="3" cy="7" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="7" cy="7" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="3" cy="12" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="7" cy="12" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
    <span style="color:#06b6d4;font-size:11px">▾</span>
    <div><span style="font-weight:600">Liste déroulante</span> <span style="color:#9ca3af">...</span></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Centre : PDF Fiche d'interventions -->
    <div class="apc" style="background:#f7f7f9;padding:16px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden">
    <div class="pdf-mock" style="max-width:340px;width:100%;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.12);background:#fff">
    <!-- Header teal foncé -->
    <div style="background:#2F3970;padding:20px 18px 16px;position:relative;overflow:hidden">
    <div style="position:absolute;bottom:-8px;left:0;right:0;height:28px;background:#fff;border-radius:50% 50% 0 0 / 100% 100% 0 0;opacity:.08"></div>
    <div style="text-align:right;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#fff">
    <div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2">Fiche d'interventions</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:400;opacity:.75;margin-top:2px">N°</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Corps formulaire -->
    <div style="padding:14px">
    <!-- Ligne date + client -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px">
    <div>
    <div style="font-size:7.5px;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">Date et heure de début :</div>
    <div style="height:22px;border:1.5px solid rgba(139,92,246,.45);border-radius:4px;background:#f5f3ff;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 7px;font-size:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#7c3aed;gap:4px">
    <svg width="9" height="9" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="2" y="3" width="12" height="11" rx="1.5"/><path d="M5 3V1M11 3V1M2 7h12"/></svg>
    Date
    </div>
    </div>
    <div>
    <div style="font-size:7.5px;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">Nom du client :</div>
    <div style="height:22px;border:1.5px solid rgba(59,130,246,.35);border-radius:4px;background:#eff6ff;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 7px;font-size:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#1d4ed8;gap:4px">
    <span>T</span> Texte libre
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px">
    <div>
    <div style="font-size:7.5px;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">Date et heure de fin :</div>
    <div style="height:22px;border:1.5px solid #e4e4e7;border-radius:4px;background:#f9f9f9;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 7px;font-size:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#9ca3af"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
    <div style="font-size:7.5px;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">Adresse :</div>
    <div style="height:22px;border:1.5px solid #e4e4e7;border-radius:4px;background:#f9f9f9"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:10px">
    <div style="font-size:7.5px;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">Intervenant :</div>
    <div style="height:22px;border:1.5px solid rgba(6,182,212,.35);border-radius:4px;background:#ecfeff;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 7px;font-size:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#0e7490;gap:4px">
    <span>▾</span> Liste déroulante
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Boxes nature + observations -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px">
    <div style="border:1.5px solid #2F3970;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden">
    <div style="background:#2F3970;padding:4px 8px;font-size:7.5px;color:#fff;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:600">Nature de l'intervention</div>
    <div style="height:42px;background:#fff"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1.5px solid #2F3970;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden">
    <div style="background:#2F3970;padding:4px 8px;font-size:7.5px;color:#fff;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:600">Observations</div>
    <div style="height:42px;background:#fff"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Description -->
    <div style="border:1.5px solid #2F3970;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden">
    <div style="background:#2F3970;padding:4px 8px;font-size:7.5px;color:#fff;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:600">Description</div>
    <div style="height:36px;background:#fff"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Droite : Panel Champs -->
    <div class="apf" style="background:#fff;border-left:1px solid #e4e4e7;padding:14px;overflow:auto">
    <div class="apft">Champs</div>
    <div class="apfs" style="line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:12px">Glissez un champ sur le PDF ou cliquez pour l'ajouter.</div>
    <div class="fld f-txt" style="margin-bottom:6px"><div class="fld-ico" style="background:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 8h10M8 3v10"/></svg></div>Texte libre</div>
    <div class="fld f-zone" style="margin-bottom:6px"><div class="fld-ico" style="background:#bae6fd;color:#0369a1"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M2 4h12M2 8h8M2 12h10"/></svg></div>Zone de texte</div>
    <div class="fld" style="background:#eff6ff;border-color:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8;margin-bottom:6px"><div class="fld-ico" style="background:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M2 8c1-2 3-3 5-1m3-1c1-1 3 0 4 2M8 13a5 5 0 010-10"/></svg></div>Téléphone</div>
    <div class="fld f-date" style="margin-bottom:6px"><div class="fld-ico" style="background:#ddd6fe;color:#6d28d9"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="2" y="3" width="12" height="11" rx="1.5"/><path d="M5 3V1M11 3V1M2 7h12"/></svg></div>Date</div>
    <div class="fld f-chk" style="margin-bottom:6px"><div class="fld-ico" style="background:#bbf7d0;color:#166534"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 8l4 4 6-6"/><rect x="1" y="1" width="14" height="14" rx="2"/></svg></div>Case à cocher</div>
    <div class="fld f-list" style="margin-bottom:6px"><div class="fld-ico" style="background:#a5f3fc;color:#0e7490">▾</div>Liste déroulante</div>
    <div class="fld f-img" style="margin-bottom:6px"><div class="fld-ico" style="background:#f9a8d4;color:#9d174d">📷</div>Image</div>
    <div class="fld f-sign"><div class="fld-ico" style="background:#fecdd3;color:#9f1239">✍</div>Signature</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div> </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
